item.title: 内存成本暴涨 300%，中国手机市场进入「大涨价元年」，千元机加速消失
item.guid: 内存成本暴涨-300%，中国手机市场进入「大涨价元年」，千元机加速消失
item.description:
This year, China's smartphone market is experiencing an unprecedented wave of price increases across the board. The core reasons stem from the sharp rise in upstream memory and storage chip costs, coupled with production capacity squeeze caused by the surge in AI server demand. The industry widely believes that 2026 will mark the "first year of major price increases" for the mobile phone industry. 今年中国智能手机市场正迎来史无前例的全线涨价潮，核心原因来自上游内存与存储芯片成本的急剧攀升，叠加 AI 服务器需求暴涨导致的产能挤压，行业普遍认为 2026 年将成为手机行业的「大涨价元年」。

Multiple supply chain and channel sources confirm that the procurement cost of smartphone storage chips has increased by over 80% compared to the same period last year, with no signs of the upward trend slowing down. 多家供应链与渠道人士确认，智能手机存储芯片采购成本较去年同期已上涨超过 80%，且涨势仍未见放缓迹象。

Affected by this, mainstream brands such as OPPO, OnePlus, vivo, Xiaomi, iQOO, and Honor have planned to launch a new round of price adjustments in early March, which will be the largest and most significant collective price adjustment in nearly five years. 受此影响，OPPO、一加、vivo、小米、iQOO、荣耀等主流品牌已拟定于 3 月初启动新一轮价格调整，这将成为近五年来规模最大、涨幅最显著的一轮集体调价。

Citing multiple sources, Sina Tech reported that starting in March, mobile phone price increases will enter an accelerated phase, with new product price increases exceeding 1,000 yuan at a minimum, and mid-to-high-end flagship models potentially seeing increases of 2,000-3,000 yuan. 新浪科技援引多方消息称，自 3 月起，手机涨价将进入加速阶段，新品涨幅最低将超过 1000 元，中高端旗舰机型涨幅可能达到 2000-3000 元。

At the same time, some brands will also raise the prices of older models. The Chinese mobile phone market in 2026 may see multiple price adjustments within a single year for the first time, and the budget phone market may face the dilemma of "losing money if you release, and losing money if you sell." 同时，部分品牌还将上调老款机型售价，2026 年中国手机市场或将首次出现一年内多次调价的情况，千元机市场也或将迎来「发了就是亏，卖了就是赔」的窘境。

It is worth noting that, according to Korean media DealSite, during negotiations for Samsung Semiconductor to supply LPDDR5X memory for the iPhone 17 series to Apple, the original plan was to increase prices by only about 60%, but Apple quickly nodded and accepted the 100% initial quote . 值得注意的是，据韩媒 DealSite 报道，三星半导体在向苹果供应 iPhone 17 系列所需的 LPDDR5X 内存谈判中，原先计划只涨价约 60%， 但苹果却迅速点头接受了 100% 的起始报价 。

This result not only established Samsung's absolute pricing power in the memory market but also triggered a chain reaction, forcing Samsung's own mobile business division to bear the same price increase pressure. Ultimately, it led to the introduction of competitor Micron's chips to ensure supply, adopting a "Samsung and Micron each account for 50%" strategy in the initial batches of the new S26 series. 这一结果不仅确立了三星在内存市场的绝对定价权，更引发连锁反应，导致三星自家的移动业务部门被迫承受同等涨价压力，最终引入竞争对手美光的芯片以保障供应，在新机 S26 系列的初期批次中采用了「三星与美光各占 50%」的策略。

Yesterday, Hu Xinxin (@馨心_Mia), product manager for Xiaomi REDMI, also expressed her views on the matter, stating that the current storage super cycle is truly a "ghost story" for mobile phone manufacturers . 昨天，小米REDMI产品经理胡馨心（@馨心_Mia）也就此事发表了看法，她表示， 当前的存储超级周期对手机厂商而言，真是「鬼故事」系列 。

Multiple institutions predict that the memory shortage will continue until 2027, and as TSMC's more advanced processes enter mass production in 2028, costs will be difficult to return to past levels. This means that mobile phone prices will remain high for the next three years, and the industry will enter a long-term structural price increase cycle. 多家机构预测，内存短缺将持续至 2027 年，且随着台积电更先进制程在 2028 年量产，成本难以回落至过去水平。这意味着未来三年手机价格仍将维持高位，行业将进入长期结构性涨价周期。

🔗 Related reading: "Release and lose, sell and lose": The era of mobile phone downgrades and price increases has arrived 🔗 相关阅读： 「发了就亏，卖了就赔」：手机减配涨价的大时代来了

item.title: Nano Banana 2 上线：高画质与高速生成首次兼得
item.guid: Nano-Banana-2-上线：高画质与高速生成首次兼得
item.description:
Today, Google officially launched its new generation image generation model, Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image), which focuses on further improving image quality, understanding, and subject consistency based on high-speed generation. It is positioned as a lightweight alternative to Nano Banana Pro, open for use by a wider range of users. 今天，Google 正式推出新一代图像生成模型 Nano Banana 2（Gemini 3.1 Flash Image），主打在高速生成的基础上进一步提升画质、理解力与主体一致性，定位为 Nano Banana Pro 的轻量替代方案，面向更广泛用户开放使用。

Nano Banana 2 continues the Gemini series' real-world knowledge base and combines it with real-time information from web searches, enabling the model to perform more naturally in terms of spatial understanding, proportional relationships, light and shadow processing, and Chinese text rendering. Nano Banana 2 延续 Gemini 系列的真实世界知识库，并结合网页搜索实时信息，使模型在空间理解、比例关系、光影处理与中文文本渲染方面表现更自然。

    Can maintain up to 5 character faces unchanged and 14 object appearances consistent in a single generation, suitable for complex scenarios such as comic serialization and storyboard production;

    Covers output from 512px to 4K, with sharper image quality and more natural light and shadow compared to the previous generation, directly usable for marketing materials or visual design;

    Adopts the same efficient architecture as Gemini Flash, emphasizing "near real-time" high-speed generation experience, suitable for rapid iteration and multiple rounds of modifications;

    In terms of cost, regular users can generate 100 images for free daily in the Gemini app and Google Search, while Pro users' quota increases to 1000 images; API prices are halved compared to the previous generation Pro model, with the cost of generating a 4K image being approximately $0.15;

    Regarding content credibility, Google has upgraded SynthID digital watermarking and C2PA content credentials to enhance AI content traceability.

🔗 Related reading: Just released, Nano Banana 2! Cheap, powerful, and understands Chinese better. Here's what I found after experiencing it 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，Nano Banana 2 发布！便宜又大碗还更懂中文，体验后我发现这些细节

item.title: 苹果 2026 首款新品周一亮相
item.guid: 苹果-2026-首款新品周一亮相
item.description:
Last night, Apple CEO Tim Cook officially announced on social media: 昨晚，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 在社交媒体官宣：

An exciting week is coming. Everything kicks off next Monday evening, Beijing time!

Previously, Apple had officially announced that new products would be released at 10 PM on March 4th. From the latest news, it is highly likely that Apple will adopt a rhythm of releasing one new product per day to maintain buzz throughout the week. 此前，苹果已经官宣将于 3 月 4 日晚上 10 点发布新品。而从最新的消息来看，苹果很有可能采用一天发布一款新品节奏，以维持整周的热度。

According to multiple sources, this release is expected to bring updates to several entry-level products. 据多方消息，本次发布有望带来多款入门级产品的更新。

    iPhone 17e: Will align with the standard iPhone 17, maintaining consistency in core specifications such as processor and MagSafe, but will continue the previous generation's single-camera design. This new iPhone is expected to enter emerging markets and enterprise procurement channels at a highly competitive price;

    Entry-level MacBook: Multiple sources indicate that Apple is testing a low-cost MacBook solution powered by A-series chips, with a target price potentially falling into the $600 range;

In addition, the MacBook Air and MacBook Pro product lines equipped with M5 series chips may also be updated, and Apple's own Studio Display is also expected to receive an update. 除此之外，还有可能更新搭载 M5 系列芯片的 MacBook Air、MacBook Pro 产品线，苹果自家的显示器 Studio Display 也有望迎来更新。

item.title: Google 官方「豆包手机」曝光：可让 Gemini 直接操控 App
item.guid: Google-官方「豆包手机」曝光：可让-Gemini-直接操控-App
item.description:
According to 9to5Google, Google will introduce a new API in the Android system to enable AI Agents to control apps, similar to the "Doubao Phone". 据 9to5Google 报道，Google 将在 Android 系统中推出一个新的 API 接口，以实现类似「豆包手机」让 AI Agent 操控 App 的功能。

According to Android's official documentation, AppFunctions is an Android 16 platform capability, accompanied by the Jetpack library, allowing developers to expose specific in-app functionalities to AI Agents in a structured manner for invocation. 根据 Android 官方文档，AppFunctions 是 Android 16 的平台能力，并配套 Jetpack 库，允许开发者将应用内的特定功能以结构化方式暴露给 AI Agent 调用。

Developers can generate necessary code via annotations, metadata, and the KSP compiler, enabling AI Agent applications like Gemini to execute tasks directly in the device background without needing to jump to the application interface. 开发者可通过注解、元数据与 KSP 编译器生成必要代码，使 Gemini 等 AI Agent 应用在设备后台直接执行任务，无需跳转应用界面。

At yesterday's Samsung Galaxy S26 series launch event, Google demonstrated the practical implementation of AppFunctions: users simply tell Gemini "Show me cat photos in Samsung Gallery," and the system automatically invokes the gallery function and returns the results directly, without needing to manually open the app and search. 在昨天三星 Galaxy S26 系列的发布会上，Google 展示了 AppFunctions 的实际落地：用户只需向 Gemini 说出「给我看三星图库里猫的照片」，系统即可自动调用图库的函数并直接返回结果，无需手动打开应用翻找。

This feature will first launch on the Galaxy S26 and Pixel 10 series in the US and South Korea, initially supporting only some food delivery, fresh produce, and ride-hailing apps, and will also be rolled out to more Samsung devices with OneUI 8.5. 该功能将率先在美国与韩国的 Galaxy S26 与 Pixel 10 系列上线，初期仅支持部分外卖、生鲜与网约车应用，还将随 OneUI 8.5 推送至更多三星设备。

Ni Fei, President of Nubia, stated on Weibo yesterday that while the combination of Samsung and Google demonstrated phone automation capabilities, it still belongs to "local capabilities" and has not reached the "full-scenario system-level" self-driving AI experience of the "Doubao Phone" Nubia M153. 努比亚总裁倪飞昨天在微博表示，三星与 Google 的组合虽展示了手机自动化能力，但仍属于「局部能力」，并未达到「豆包手机」努比亚 M153「全场景系统级」的自动驾驶式 AI 体验。

He emphasized that Nubia had already released a technical preview of the Doubao Phone last year, promoting the deep system-level application of AI agents on mobile phones, and looks forward to more manufacturers joining to collectively improve scenario coverage and implementation depth. 他强调，努比亚在去年已率先发布豆包手机技术预览版，推动手机端 AI 智能体进入系统级深度应用，并期待更多厂商加入，共同完善场景覆盖与落地深度。

item.title: 国产大模型 2 月霸榜 OpenRouter，MiniMax、Kimi 领跑全球 Token 调用量
item.guid: 国产大模型-2-月霸榜-OpenRouter，MiniMax、Kimi-领跑全球-Token-调用量
item.description:
According to a report by "STAR Market Daily," in February this year, Chinese large models completely dominated the global Token call volume on the OpenRouter platform, with domestic models occupying four of the top five spots, showing a trend of simultaneous leaps in application demand and technical capabilities. 据《科创板日报》报道，今年 2 月，中国大模型在 OpenRouter 平台的全球 Token 调用量全面霸榜，国产模型在榜单前五中占据四席，呈现出应用需求与技术能力同步跃升的趋势。

The latest data for February shows that Chinese models such as MiniMax, Moonshot AI (Kimi), and DeepSeek have seen significant growth globally. 2 月份的最新数据显示，MiniMax、月之暗面（Kimi）、DeepSeek 等中国模型在全球范围内迎来显著增长。

The MiniMax M2.5 model, released just two weeks ago, ranked first monthly with 4.55 trillion Token calls; Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.5 ranked second with 4.02 trillion Token calls. Google Gemini 3 Flash Preview, DeepSeek V3.2, and Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 followed.

Weekly data also shows the strong performance of domestic models. From February 9th to 15th, Chinese model call volume surpassed US models for the first time; from February 16th to 22nd, Chinese model weekly call volume further rose to 5.16 trillion Tokens, with a cumulative increase of 127% over three weeks. 周度数据同样显示出国产模型的强势表现。2 月 9 日至 15 日，中国模型调用量首次超过美国模型；16 日至 22 日，中国模型周调用量进一步升至 5.16 万亿 Token，三周累计涨幅达 127%。

Moonshot AI stated that Kimi K2.5's cumulative revenue has exceeded that of the entire previous year in less than a month since its release, with particularly significant growth in overseas paying users. 月之暗面方面称，Kimi K2.5 发布不到一个月，累计收入已超过去年全年，海外付费用户增长尤为明显。

item.title: 苹果推出官方测速工具
item.guid: 苹果推出官方测速工具
item.description:
Recently, Apple officially launched a network speed test tool within the "Apple Support" App, supporting iOS 18 and later systems. 近日，苹果在「Apple 支持」App 内正式上线网络测速工具，支持 iOS18 及更高版本系统。

After updating to version 5.12, the newly added speed test tool within the app allows users to test the download, upload speeds, and latency of their current network environment with one click. 在更新至 5.12 版本后，应用内新增的测速工具允许用户一键测试当前网络环境的下载、上传速率及延迟情况。

This speed test tool maintains the concise style of system-level applications, with smooth interface animations and no ad interference, making it lighter and more direct than third-party speed test apps on the market. 该测速工具延续了系统级应用的简洁风格，界面动画流畅，无任何广告干扰，相比市面上第三方测速 App 更加轻量、直接。

However, the entry point for this feature is somewhat hidden, located under the "Internet Speed Test" in the "Device Performance" secondary menu. 不过，该功能入口藏得较深，位于「设备性能」二级菜单下的「互联网速度测试」。

item.title: 前苹果与 Meta 高管庞若鸣加盟 OpenAI
item.guid: 前苹果与-Meta-高管庞若鸣加盟-OpenAI
item.description:
According to "The Information," Ruoming Pang, former head of Apple's foundational model team and former head of AI infrastructure at Meta's Superintelligence Lab, has officially joined OpenAI. 据《The Information》报道，前苹果基础模型团队负责人、前 Meta 超级智能实验室 AI 基础设施负责人庞若鸣（Ruoming Pang）已正式加入 OpenAI。

🔗 Related Reading: Just now, Silicon Valley's most expensive Chinese person gave up a sky-high $1.4 billion offer, and SJTU alumnus Pang Ruoming defected to OpenAI 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，硅谷最贵华人放弃 14 亿天价 offer，上交校友庞若鸣提桶投奔 OpenAI

Last year, Pang Ruoming left Apple to join Meta, and within less than a year, he changed jobs again. According to multiple reports, his compensation package at Meta was valued at over $200 million, including multi-year incentives. 去年，庞若鸣从苹果离职后加入 Meta，不到一年时间再次跳槽。据多方报道，他在 Meta 的薪酬方案价值超过 2 亿美元，包含多年期激励。

Before joining Meta, Pang Ruoming led Apple's Foundational Model team (AFM), guiding approximately 100 people in developing large language models to provide underlying capabilities for features like Apple Intelligence. 而在加入 Meta 之前，庞若鸣曾领导苹果基础模型团队（AFM），带领约 100 人研发大型语言模型，为 Apple Intelligence 等功能提供底层能力。

Companies like Meta, OpenAI, and Apple are all attracting top researchers with high salaries. Over the past year, several core members have also left Meta's AI team, including executives like Yann LeCun. Meta、OpenAI、苹果等公司均在以高额薪酬吸引顶尖研究者，过去一年 Meta AI 团队也出现多位核心成员离职，包括 Yann LeCun 等高管。

item.title: IBM 回应 AI 冲击：现代化远不止改代码
item.guid: IBM-回应-AI-冲击：现代化远不止改代码
item.description:
Recently, Rob Thomas, IBM Senior Vice President, published an article responding to external discussions surrounding "Can AI quickly replace COBOL and mainframes?" 近日，IBM 高级副总裁 Rob Thomas 发布文章，回应外界围绕「AI 能否快速替代 COBOL 与大型机」的讨论。

Previously, Anthropic announced that Claude Code can automatically sort COBOL dependencies, generate documentation, and identify risks, sparking market concerns about the impact on IBM's mainframe business. IBM's stock price recorded its largest single-day drop in nearly 26 years this Monday local time, with its market value evaporating by approximately $31 billion. 此前，Anthropic 宣布 Claude Code 能自动梳理 COBOL 依赖、生成文档并识别风险，引发市场对 IBM 主机业务受冲击的担忧，IBM 股价在当地时间本周一录得近 26 年最大单日跌幅，市值蒸发约 310 亿美元。

The article points out that the core value of the IBM Z mainframe platform lies not in COBOL, but in its vertically integrated architecture from chip to operating system, which provides extremely high transaction processing capabilities, security, and availability. 文章指出，IBM Z 大型机平台的核心价值不在 COBOL，而在于其从芯片到操作系统的垂直整合架构，能够提供极高的事务处理能力、安全性与可用性。

IBM states that simply converting COBOL to other languages cannot replicate these capabilities, nor can it solve true modernization challenges, including data architecture refactoring, runtime replacement, transactional consistency, disaster recovery capabilities, encryption systems, and integration with surrounding systems. IBM 表示，单纯把 COBOL 转成其他语言，并不能复制这些能力，也无法解决真正的现代化难题，包括数据架构重构、运行时替代、事务一致性、灾备能力、加密体系以及与周边系统的集成等。

The article also points out that the advantages of IBM Z are even more prominent in the AI era. AI tools are helping enterprises automatically analyze legacy system structures, accelerate DevOps processes, reduce manual operations, and alleviate the skill gap caused by the retirement of COBOL talent. 文章还指出，IBM Z 的优势在 AI 时代反而更突出。AI 工具正在帮助企业自动分析遗留系统结构、加速 DevOps 流程、减少人工操作，并缓解 COBOL 人才退休带来的技能缺口。

IBM believes that these trends mean enterprises should continue to increase their investment in IBM Z. IBM 认为，这些趋势意味着企业应继续加大对 IBM Z 的投入。

IBM emphasizes that AI can indeed bring value in the code domain, but it should not be misunderstood as being able to "one-click replace" mainframe platforms. True modernization work is far more complex than language conversion. IBM 强调，AI 在代码领域确实能带来价值，但不应被误解为可以「一键替代」大型机平台。真正的现代化工作远比语言转换复杂得多。

item.title: 《原神》悄悄移除语音数据用于训练 AI 的条款
item.guid: 《原神》悄悄移除语音数据用于训练-AI-的条款
item.description:
According to Eurogamer, Genshin Impact's privacy policy previously included a clause allowing the processing of voice communication data when players used the voice chat function. This clause was quietly removed recently. 据 Eurogamer 报道，《原神》隐私政策中，曾包含一项允许在玩家使用语音聊天功能时处理语音通信数据的条款。该条款近日被悄然删除。

Like many AI-driven experiences, we may use user-generated input (such as chat data) to train and optimize models used to provide services.

User "Cevian" first noticed this change on the social platform Bluesky. However, Chapter 2 of the new policy still retains the statement "Users can opt out of model training at any time in the service-related settings," emphasizing that opting out will not affect the existing game experience. 用户「Cevian」最早在社交平台 Bluesky 上注意到这一变化。不过新版政策第 2 章仍保留「用户可随时在服务相关设置中退出模型训练」的说明，且强调退出不会影响现有游戏体验。

The report further points out that this deletion occurred after the privacy policy was updated on January 14, and the official has not yet publicly explained the reason for the deletion. However, upon verification, the Chinese version of Genshin Impact's privacy policy does not contain such a clause. 报道进一步指出，这一删除行为发生在隐私政策 1 月 14 日更新之后，官方尚未就删除原因作出公开解释。不过，据核实，中文版的《原神》隐私政策并不存在此类条款。

The report also mentions that miHoYo has repeatedly expressed its commitment to generative AI in recent years, including features such as "AI ecological simulation system," "all-terrain combat AI," and "highly intelligent NPCs" showcased in the Unreal Engine 5 large-scale MMO project trailer released last year. 报道同时提到，米哈游近年来多次公开表达对生成式 AI 的投入，包括去年发布的虚幻引擎 5 大型 MMO 项目预告片中展示的「人工智能生态模拟系统」「全地形战斗 AI」及「高智能 NPC」等特性。

item.title: 小鹏第二代 VLA 进入 L4 常态化测试，量产「近在眼前」
item.guid: 小鹏第二代-VLA-进入-L4-常态化测试，量产「近在眼前」
item.description:
Yesterday, "XP-Candice Tingting," Senior Director of Autonomous Driving Products at Xpeng Motors, shared a Robotaxi real-world test video filmed by the testing team at the factory on Weibo. 昨天，小鹏汽车自动驾驶产品高级总监「XP‑Candice 婷婷」在微博分享了测试团队在工厂拍摄的 Robotaxi 实测视频。

She stated that models equipped with the second-generation VLA have passed third-party site tests and obtained Guangzhou intelligent connected vehicle road test permits. They are currently undergoing regular L4 public road tests, and mass production "is just around the corner." 她表示，搭载第二代 VLA 的车型已通过第三方场地测试，并获得广州智能网联汽车道路测试许可，目前正在进行常态化 L4 公开道路测试，量产「已经近在眼前」。

According to Zheng Rongqing, Xpeng Motors Platform Product Marketing Director, the Xpeng GX can already perform complete operations such as starting from a standstill, autonomous driving, pulling over to stop, and picking up passengers and restarting, even without a driver in the main seat and without maps in the park, demonstrating high autonomous driving stability. 另据小鹏汽车平台产品营销总监郑荣卿介绍，小鹏 GX 在主驾无人、园区无图的条件下，已能完成原地起步、自主行驶、靠边临停、接客再起步等完整操作，展示出较高的自动驾驶稳定性。

The second-generation VLA was released last November, featuring "in-brain reasoning" model capabilities that can generate response strategies for different scenarios. Previous reports show that this system has brought multiple capability upgrades, including small road NGP, with the average takeover mileage on complex small roads increasing by approximately 13 times. 第二代 VLA 于去年 11 月发布，主打「可进行脑内推理」的模型能力，能够针对不同场景生成应对策略。此前报道显示，该系统已带来包括小路 NGP 在内的多项能力升级，复杂小路平均接管里程提升约 13 倍。

XPeng Chairman He Xiaopeng previously revealed that Volkswagen will be the first customer for the second-generation VLA model. 小鹏董事长何小鹏此前也透露，大众将成为第二代 VLA 模型的首发客户。

item.title: 雷军马年首场直播定档今晚，详解小米汽车安全体系
item.guid: 雷军马年首场直播定档今晚，详解小米汽车安全体系
item.description:
Xiaomi Auto announced that Lei Jun will host his first live broadcast of the Year of the Horse tonight at 7:30 PM, focusing on "About Safety," located at the Xiaomi Auto factory. 小米汽车宣布，雷军将于今晚 7 点半开启马年首场直播，主题聚焦「关于安全」，地点位于小米汽车工厂。

Lei Jun stated that this live broadcast will systematically introduce Xiaomi Auto's complete safety system and will invite multiple experts to participate. He emphasized that the content is "very professional, possibly a bit dry." 雷军表示，本次直播将系统介绍小米汽车的整套安全体系，并邀请多位专家共同参与。他强调相关内容「非常专业，可能有点枯燥」。

And yesterday, Caixin revealed key details of the Chengdu Xiaomi SU7 Ultra drunk driving accident on October 13 last year: 而在昨天，《财新》披露了去年 10 月 13 日成都小米 SU7 Ultra 酒驾事故的关键细节：

The report cited an opinion from the Sichuan Xihua Traffic Judicial Appraisal Center, which showed that the accident vehicle's speed reached 167km/h at the moment of the initial impact. The power battery experienced cell short-circuiting due to compression, causing high-voltage current to surge into the low-voltage circuit, leading to a power outage in the low-voltage system and rendering the electronic release function of the exterior door handles inoperable. 报道援引四川西华交通司法鉴定中心的意见书，其中显示，事故车辆在首次碰撞瞬间车速高达 167km/h，动力电池因挤压导致电芯短路，高压电流窜入低压电路，引发低压系统断电，使车门外把手的电子释放功能失效。

As the vehicle was not equipped with an external mechanical emergency pull handle, the car door could not be opened from the outside, and the driver ultimately died from burns due to the vehicle catching fire. Chengdu Public Security had previously determined that the driver bore full responsibility for the accident due to drunk driving and severe speeding. 由于车辆未配备外置机械应急拉手，车门无法从外部开启，驾驶员最终因车辆起火燃烧导致火烧死亡。成都公安此前已认定驾驶员因酒驾与严重超速承担事故全部责任。

This accident also sparked public concern regarding electronic door handles, battery safety, and emergency escape mechanisms. 本次事故也引发公众对于电子门把手、电池安全与应急逃生机制的关注。

item.title: 派拉蒙报价提高至 1110 亿美元，Netflix 放弃收购华纳
item.guid: 派拉蒙报价提高至-1110-亿美元，Netflix-放弃收购华纳
item.description:
According to Variety, Netflix has officially abandoned its plan to raise its acquisition offer for Warner Bros., bringing a critical turn to the months-long Hollywood merger battle. 据《Variety》报道，Netflix 已正式放弃提高对华纳兄弟的收购报价，为这场持续数月的好莱坞并购战带来关键转折。

Netflix stated that after Paramount made a higher offer, continuing to bid was "no longer financially attractive." Warner's board determined Paramount's latest proposal to be a "superior proposal" in late February. Netflix 表示，在派拉蒙提出更高报价后，继续竞价已「不再具有财务吸引力」。华纳董事会在 2 月下旬认定派拉蒙的最新方案为「更优提案」。

Ultimately, Netflix chose to withdraw, making Paramount the most likely buyer to acquire Warner. 最终，Netflix 选择退出，使派拉蒙成为当前最有可能收购华纳的买家。

Previously, Warner and Netflix had reached a preliminary merger agreement, but Paramount submitted an all-company acquisition proposal of approximately $111 billion on February 24, far exceeding Netflix's nearly $83 billion deal size for acquiring only Warner Bros. Pictures and its streaming business. 此前，华纳与 Netflix 已达成初步合并协议，但派拉蒙在 2 月 24 日提交约 1110 亿美元的全公司收购方案，远高于 Netflix 仅收购华纳影业与流媒体业务的近 830 亿美元交易规模。

Paramount's proposal includes $31 per share in cash, a $7 billion regulatory breakup fee, and the assumption of a $2.8 billion termination fee that Warner would owe Netflix. 派拉蒙的方案包括每股 31 美元现金、70 亿美元监管分手费，以及承担华纳需向 Netflix 支付的 28 亿美元终止费。

The acquisition scope covers all of Warner's businesses, including CNN, Discovery, HBO Max, DC Studios, and content assets such as "Harry Potter," "The White Lotus," and "Succession." If the deal is successful, it will further reduce Hollywood's remaining five major traditional film studios to four. 收购范围覆盖华纳全部业务，包括 CNN、Discovery、HBO Max、DC Studios 及《哈利 · 波特》《白莲花度假村》《继承之战》等内容资产，若交易成功，将把好莱坞仅存的五大传统电影公司进一步压缩至四家。

Netflix emphasized in a statement that its business is "healthy and continuously growing," and this year it will invest approximately $20 billion in content production and resume its stock repurchase program. Co-CEOs Ted Sarandos and Greg Peters stated that acquiring Warner "would be icing on the cake, not a necessity." Netflix 在声明中强调，公司业务「健康且持续增长」，今年将投入约 200 亿美元用于内容制作，并恢复股票回购计划。联合 CEO Ted Sarandos 与 Greg Peters 表示，收购华纳「是锦上添花，而非必须」。

With Netflix's withdrawal, Warner's ultimate fate will depend on regulatory review and shareholder votes. If Paramount ultimately succeeds, this will become one of the largest and most far-reaching media mergers in recent years. 随着 Netflix 退出，华纳的最终归属将取决于监管审查及股东投票。若派拉蒙最终成功，这将成为近年来规模最大、影响最深远的媒体并购案之一。

item.title: 爱奇艺去年营收 272.9 亿元，连续四年盈利
item.guid: 爱奇艺去年营收-272.9-亿元，连续四年盈利
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, iQiyi yesterday released its unaudited fourth-quarter and full-year financial reports as of December 31, 2025, showing that the platform continues to maintain profitability under content strategy and business structure adjustments, having achieved operating profitability for four consecutive years. 据界面新闻报道，爱奇艺昨天公布截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日未经审计的第四季度及全年财报，显示平台在内容策略与业务结构调整下继续保持盈利态势，已连续四年实现运营盈利。

The financial report shows that membership services, advertising services, and overseas businesses all maintained growth momentum, becoming key factors driving overall revenue improvement. 财报显示，会员业务、广告业务及海外业务均保持增长势头，成为推动整体收入改善的关键因素。

Full-year total revenue was RMB 27.29 billion, with Non-GAAP operating profit reaching RMB 640 million; among which, total revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025 was RMB 6.79 billion, achieving both year-on-year and quarter-on-quarter growth, with quarterly Non-GAAP operating profit of RMB 140 million.

item.title: 百度去年 AI 业务营收达 400 亿元，萝卜快跑累计出行破 2000 万
item.guid: 百度去年-AI-业务营收达-400-亿元，萝卜快跑累计出行破-2000-万
item.description:
Yesterday, Baidu released its fourth-quarter and full-year financial reports for 2025, with AI Cloud, AI applications, and autonomous driving forming the three core growth drivers. 昨天，百度发布 2025 年第四季度及全年财报，AI 云、AI 应用与自动驾驶构成三大核心增长点。

    Total revenue for 2025 was RMB 129.1 billion, a year-on-year decrease of 3%; AI business revenue was RMB 40 billion;

    Fourth-quarter revenue was 32.7 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 5%. AI business revenue accounted for 43% of general business revenue, exceeding market expectations;

    Baidu's net profit attributable to shareholders in 2025 was 5.6 billion yuan; if the impact of long-term asset impairment is excluded, net profit was 19.4 billion yuan; non-GAAP net profit was 18.9 billion yuan, with a net profit margin of 15%;

    AI Cloud's full-year revenue was approximately 20 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 34%; fourth-quarter AI high-performance computing facility subscription revenue increased by 143% year-on-year;

    AI native marketing services full-year revenue increased by 301% year-on-year;

    AI application full-year revenue exceeded 10 billion yuan; over 2,000 enterprises have applied to trial the intelligent agent "Baidu Famou";

    Baidu App's monthly active users reached 679 million; Wenxin Assistant's monthly active users reached 202 million, with the Spring Festival red packet event driving a 4-fold year-on-year increase in monthly active users;

    Apollo Go's global autonomous driving ride-hailing services reached 3.4 million trips in the fourth quarter, a year-on-year increase of over 200%; cumulative ride-hailing services exceeded 20 million trips, covering 26 cities worldwide, with fully autonomous driving mileage exceeding 190 million kilometers.

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：AI 助手不会取代软件行业
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：AI-助手不会取代软件行业
item.description:
NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang recently responded again to external concerns about AI impacting the software industry during an interview with CNBC. 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋近日接受 CNBC 采访时，再次回应外界关于 AI 将冲击软件行业的担忧。

He emphasized that the market's understanding of this issue has a "misjudgment," and AI assistants will not only not replace software tools but will further improve the efficiency of the software industry. 他强调，市场对这一问题的理解出现「判断失误」，AI 助手不仅不会取代软件工具，反而会进一步提升软件行业的效率。

He pointed out that AI assistants will become "users of tools," not substitutes. Whether it's Cadence, Synopsys, ServiceNow, or SAP, the fundamental reasons for the existence of these tools will not change; AI will further enhance productivity on top of these tools. 他指出，AI 助手将成为「工具的使用者」，而不是替代者。无论是 Cadence、Synopsys、ServiceNow 还是 SAP，这些工具存在的根本原因不会改变，AI 将在这些工具之上进一步提升生产力。

We need tools to perform specific tasks and provide us with information in a way we can understand.

This statement came after NVIDIA released strong financial results. 这一表态出现在英伟达发布强劲财报之后。

In the fourth fiscal quarter of fiscal year 2026, NVIDIA's revenue reached $68.127 billion, a year-on-year increase of 73%, exceeding market expectations. During the earnings call, Jensen Huang emphasized that the turning point for agent AI has arrived, and global enterprises are increasing their investment in computing power. 2026 财年第四财季，英伟达营收达到 681.27 亿美元，同比增长 73%，高于市场预期。在财报电话会上，黄仁勋强调，智能体 AI 的拐点已经到来，全球企业正在加大算力投入。

In this new world of AI, computing power is revenue.

item.title: OPPO Find N6 真机曝光：肉眼几乎看不到折痕
item.guid: OPPO-Find-N6-真机曝光：肉眼几乎看不到折痕
item.description:
Recently, reporters from "Guangdong News Broadcast" visited OPPO's mobile phone production line and released a real device video of the upcoming foldable new product Find N6, showing that its crease is "so shallow it's almost invisible." 近日，《广东新闻联播》记者探访了 OPPO 手机生产一线，释出了即将发布的折叠屏新品 Find N6 的真机视频，显示其折痕「浅到几乎看不见」。

According to an article released by OPPO official, following its predecessor's entry into the 8mm slim era, the new device has comprehensively upgraded its folding structure, materials, and manufacturing precision. Staff introduced that to achieve a crease-free fold, the technical team spent 3 years trying dozens to hundreds of solutions, constantly overturning designs and re-validating them. 据 OPPO 官方发布的文章，继上一代进入 8 毫米轻薄时代后，新机在折叠结构、材料与制造精度上全面升级。工作人员介绍，为实现无痕折叠，技术团队耗时 3 年，尝试数十至上百种方案，期间不断推翻设计并重新验证。

It is worth noting that Zhou Yibao, product manager of the OPPO Find series, also revealed on Weibo yesterday that the Find N6 will feature "the only Hasselblad 200-megapixel ultra-clear quad-camera for foldables" and will be the first foldable to feature a Danxia color reproduction lens. 值得注意的是，OPPO Find 系列产品负责人周意保昨天还在微博透露，Find N6 将搭载「折叠唯一的哈苏 2 亿超清四摄」，并将首次在折叠屏搭载丹霞色彩还原镜头。

item.title: 曝 vivo X300 Ultra 全球首发索尼 2 亿像素 LYT-901
item.guid: 曝-vivo-X300-Ultra-全球首发索尼-2-亿像素-LYT-901
item.description:
According to revelations from blogger "Digital Chat Station," vivo's upcoming annual imaging flagship X300 Ultra will globally debut Sony's 200-megapixel LYT-901 main camera. 据博主「数码闲聊站」爆料，vivo 即将发布的年度影像旗舰 X300 Ultra 将全球首发索尼 2 亿像素 LYT-901 主摄。

This sensor was released in November last year, featuring a 1/1.12-inch large sensor and integrating an AI-based image processing circuit internally, supporting up to 4x lossless zoom with a single camera. 这颗传感器于去年 11 月发布，采用 1/1.12 英寸大底，并在内部集成基于 AI 的图像处理电路，支持单摄最高 4 倍无损变焦。

In addition to the main camera, the new phone is expected to feature a 3.5X periscope telephoto lens with a Samsung HPB sensor, also 200 megapixels, and a 50MP ultra-wide-angle lens, which industry insiders call "the strongest in the mobile phone industry." 除主摄外，新机预计还将搭载 3.5X 潜望长焦，传感器为同样 2 亿像素的三星 HPB，并配备被行业人士称为「手机行业最强」的 50MP 超广角镜头。

item.title: 铁路部门回应「半夜候补成功 1700 元车票作废」
item.guid: 铁路部门回应「半夜候补成功-1700-元车票作废」
item.description:
Yesterday, the railway department responded to the online rumor that 'a 1700 yuan train ticket became invalid after successful standby booking in the middle of the night,' stating that the related report was not true. 昨天，铁路部门对网传「半夜候补成功 1700 元车票作废」传闻进行了回应，称相关报道并不属实。

An article published on the 'China Railway' official WeChat account shows that the Railway 12306 Technology Center investigated the relevant orders and confirmed that the standby booking process was normal and notifications were timely, and the so-called 'invalidation' was a misinterpretation. 「中国铁路」公众号发布的文章显示，铁路 12306 技术中心对相关订单进行了核查，确认候补流程正常、通知及时，所谓「作废」系误读。

The railway department stated that Chen submitted a standby order for Xiamen (Xiamen North) to Yixing on February 19 and then independently purchased another G1656 train ticket on February 22, but did not cancel the standby order. 铁路部门表示，陈某于 2 月 19 日提交厦门（厦门北）至宜兴的候补订单，并在 2 月 22 日自行购买了另一趟 G1656 次车票，但未取消候补。

After the system fulfilled the standby order in the early morning of February 23, it sent notifications to 3 passengers according to their chosen method. Since the standby train (G1654) and the already purchased train (G1656) did not have overlapping travel times, the system would not determine it as a travel conflict, thus there was no 'automatic invalidation'. 系统在 2 月 23 日凌晨兑现候补订单后，按其选择的方式向 3 名乘车人发送了通知。由于候补车次（G1654）与已购车次（G1656）乘车时段并不重叠，系统不会判定为行程冲突，因此不存在「自动作废」。

The railway department also pointed out that some media displayed a ticket purchase interface that was not the official 12306 page, and reminded passengers to purchase tickets only through official channels and to cancel standby orders promptly if other tickets have already been purchased, to avoid misunderstandings. 铁路部门还指出，部分媒体展示的购票界面并非 12306 官方页面，并提醒旅客务必通过官方渠道购票，若已购买其他车票需及时取消候补订单，以免造成误解。

item.title: 携程董事与总裁辞职
item.guid: 携程董事与总裁辞职
item.description:
According to reports from The Paper and The Beijing News, Trip.com Group yesterday announced its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, and disclosed significant personnel changes in its board and management, with two co-founders, Fan Min and Ji Qi, resigning as company director and president, and company director, respectively . 据澎湃新闻和新京报报道，携程集团昨天公布了 2025 年第四季度及全年未经审计财报，并披露董事会与管理层重大人事变动， 两位联合创始人范敏、季琦分别辞任公司董事兼总裁、公司董事职务 。

At the same time, the company appointed Wu Yihong and Xiao Yang as new independent directors, and added Li Jipei as a member of the board's compensation committee. 与此同时，公司任命吴亦泓、萧杨为新任独立董事，并新增李基培为董事会薪酬委员会成员。

    Trip.com's net revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025 was approximately 15.398 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of approximately 20.83%;

    Net profit attributable to the parent company was approximately 4.281 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of approximately 98.47%. Full-year net revenue was approximately 62.409 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of approximately 17%;

    Net profit attributable to the parent company was approximately 33.294 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of approximately 95%.

The significant increase in profit mainly came from a substantial rise in 'other income'. 利润大幅增长主要来自「其他收入」的显著提升。

    In the fourth quarter of 2025, Trip.com recorded other income of 2.038 billion yuan, compared to an expenditure of 137 million yuan in the same period last year;

    Full-year other income reached 21.321 billion yuan, nearly a 10-fold increase year-on-year, primarily due to proceeds from the sale of shares in the Indian online travel platform 'MakeMyTrip'. If this impact is excluded, Trip.com's full-year operating profit for 2025 increased by approximately 11% year-on-year.

Trip.com CEO Jane Sun revealed in a conference call that the transaction volume of the core OTA business in 2025 was approximately 1.1 trillion yuan, with accommodation and air ticket businesses contributing approximately 280 billion yuan and 550 billion yuan, respectively. 携程 CEO 孙洁在电话会议中透露，2025 年核心 OTA 业务成交额约 1.1 万亿元，其中住宿与机票业务分别贡献约 2800 亿元与 5500 亿元。

It is worth noting that Trip.com mentioned in its financial report that it received an investigation notice from the State Administration for Market Regulation in January this year. The investigation is currently ongoing, and the company is fully cooperating with regulatory authorities. 值得关注的是，携程在财报中提及，今年 1 月收到国家市场监管总局调查通知，目前调查仍在进行，公司正全力配合监管部门。

item.title: 停产 CCD 相机再翻红，涨价达数倍
item.guid: 停产-CCD-相机再翻红，涨价达数倍
item.description:
According to CCTV Finance, CCD digital cameras, which have been out of production for many years, have recently become popular again, becoming a 'hit' product sought after by young consumers. Several merchants in Huaqiangbei stated that models originally priced at only a few hundred yuan are now generally selling for over 2,000 yuan, with some models even seeing price increases of several times. 据央视财经报道，停产多年的 CCD 数码相机近期再次翻红，成为年轻消费群体追捧的「爆款」产品。多位华强北商户表示，原本售价仅数百元的机型，如今普遍涨至 2000 元以上，部分型号甚至出现数倍涨幅。

Huaqiangbei merchants revealed that in earlier years, CCD cameras were even sold by the jin (half-kilogram), at about 100 yuan per jin. The current price surge is mainly due to being out of production for many years, limited stock, and driven by aesthetic trends. 华强北商户透露，早些年 CCD 相机甚至曾按斤出售，约 100 元一斤，如今价格飙升主要源于停产多年、存量有限，加之审美潮流推动。

However, merchants also warned that most CCD cameras currently circulating in the market are old second-hand units, generally posing risks such as battery aging, sensor wear, and shutter life nearing its limit, with product condition significantly impacting failure rates. 不过，商户也提醒，目前市场流通的 CCD 相机大多为老旧二手机，普遍存在电池老化、传感器损耗、快门寿命接近极限等风险，品相对故障率影响显著。

item.title: 《阿凡达 3》上映 70 天票房破 12 亿
item.guid: 《阿凡达-3》上映-70-天票房破-12-亿
item.description:
According to Maoyan Pro data, the cumulative box office for the movie 'Avatar 3: Fire and Ash' exceeded 1.2 billion RMB after 70 days of release. 据猫眼专业版数据，电影《阿凡达 3：火与烬》上映 70 天后累计票房突破 12 亿人民币。

The film was released simultaneously in the United States and mainland China last December, directed by James Cameron. The plot continues to revolve around Jake Sully and Neytiri's family, focusing on the family's growth and choices amidst conflict, while also introducing new tribes such as the 'Wind Traders' and 'Ash People' to expand Pandora's cultural and conflict structure. 影片在去年 12 月于美国和中国大陆同步上映，由詹姆斯 · 卡梅隆执导，剧情继续围绕杰克 · 萨利与奈蒂莉一家展开，叙事聚焦家族在战火中的成长与抉择，同时引入「风之商人」「灰烬族」等全新族群，扩展潘多拉星球的文化与冲突结构。

On Douban, "Avatar 3" received a rating of 7.6. 在豆瓣平台，《阿凡达 3》获得 7.6 分评价。

item.title: 《真人快打2》发布中文预告
item.guid: 《真人快打2》发布中文预告
item.description:
The new film in the "Mortal Kombat" series, "Mortal Kombat 2," released a new Chinese trailer. Its North American release date is May 15th, and its introduction to China has been confirmed. 「真人快打」系列新作电影《真人快打2》发布全新中文预告，北美地区上映时间为 5 月 15 日，国内已确认引进。

This film continues the series' high-intensity, bloody style, with director Simon McQuoid returning to direct and Jeremy Slater as the screenwriter. The story is still adapted from the eponymous fighting game IP created by Ed Boon and John Tobias. 本片延续系列高强度、血腥风格，导演赛门 · 麦奎德回归执导，编剧由杰瑞米 · 史列特担任，故事依旧改编自艾德 · 波恩与约翰 · 托比亚斯创作的同名格斗游戏 IP。

The film will revolve around the ultimate showdown between the hero faction and the villain Shao Kahn, with the story's scope further escalating and emphasizing the theme of "brutality and glory." 影片将围绕英雄阵营与反派绍康之间的终极对决展开，故事规模进一步升级，强调「残酷与荣耀」的主题。

item.title: 《熊猫计划之部落奇遇记》发布正片片段
item.guid: 《熊猫计划之部落奇遇记》发布正片片段
item.description:
The family comedy film "Panda Plan: Tribal Adventure" released a clip from the main feature titled "Close Your Eyes When It's Dark." Yu Yang, playing tribal prince Tulu, gathers everyone to decide who will undertake a special mission by drawing lots. The seemingly fair process hides a "clever trick." 合家欢喜剧电影《熊猫计划之部落奇遇记》发布「天黑请闭眼」正片片段，于洋饰演的部落王子图鲁召集众人，以抽签方式决定执行特殊任务的人选。看似公平的流程暗藏「小心机」。

The film is directed by Xu Hongyu, starring Hu Hu, Jackie Chan, Ma Li, Qiao Shan, and Yu Yang. It is currently a hit nationwide, positioned as a "family viewing" film. 影片由许宏宇执导，胡胡、成龙、马丽、乔杉、于洋领衔主演，目前正在全国热映，主打「全家观影」定位。
